rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes when they refer to component ports
Use annex agree {** ... **}; blocks for AGREE contract syntax
Refer to component names, ports, and data types from the authoritative AADL model
generic_rules: Align helper declaration types with actual expression types in AGREE
Omit Boolean range comparisons unless the port is explicitly AGREE bool
Do not encode AADL properties as AGREE variables without explicit typed ports
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Component type annexes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations
Implementation annexes are for assignments and bindings valid in that scope
anti_patterns: Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts without valid variables
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers for range comparisons
Do not reference AADL properties like Period or Deadline as AGREE variables
